Protein families: Class I-like SAM-binding methyltransferase superfamily, Cation-independent O-methyltransferase family, COMT subfamily
Sequence similarities: SIMILARITY: Belongs to the class I-like SAM-binding methyltransferase superfamily. Cation-independent O-methyltransferase family. COMT subfamily. {ECO:0000255|PROSITE-ProRule:PRU01020}.
Catalytic activity: CATALYTIC ACTIVITY: Reaction=trans-resveratrol + 2 S-adenosyl-L-methionine = pterostilbene + 2 S-adenosyl-L-homocysteine + 2 H(+); Xref=Rhea:RHEA:32103, ChEBI:CHEBI:8630, ChEBI:CHEBI:15378, ChEBI:CHEBI:45713, ChEBI:CHEBI:57856, ChEBI:CHEBI:59789; EC=2.1.1.240; Evidence={ECO:0000269|PubMed:18799660};
Function [CC]: FUNCTION: Catalyzes the biosynthesis of pterostilbene from resveratrol. Pterostilbene has both antifungal and pharmacological properties. Also has activity toward resveratrol monomethyl ether (RME). {ECO:0000269|PubMed:18799660}.
